verifier: V2 multi-axis PAPO (PCA top-k pair-difference project-out)
purpose: raw#9 hexa-only ω-cycle. §9.2.1 single-axis PAPO saturated at SMA_lift=+0.164 (AMBIGUOUS, 88% PASS gap). 본 cycle은 6개 pair difference vectors의 PCA top-k axes를 sequential project-out하여 추가 lift 회복 + PASS 도달 시도.

method.extraction: D = stack(H[i] - H[j]) over PAIRS = 6 x dim matrix; SVD top-k right singular vectors
method.steering: sequential project-out: H_steered = H - alpha * (H @ u_t) * u_t for t in 1..k

pass_runs_summary.interpretation: non-trivial — top-3 dominant axes only, paired diff NOT fully zeroed
k=6 = rank(D), all 6 paired diffs forced to 0 by construction; SMA=1.0 by mathematical identity, NOT by meaningful learning

key_finding: V2 SMA PASS achievable on BASE p1 substrate via multi-axis PAPO. lasttoken: PASS at k=3 (non-trivial, top-3 PCA axes), bwm: PASS at k=5. Single-axis PAPO saturated at +0.164; multi-axis breaks the saturation by removing additional dominant axes.
lasttoken_vs_bwm_synergy: lasttoken has stronger multi-axis PAPO response — PASS achievable at k=3 (vs bwm needs k=5). Singular values structure: lasttoken top-1 = 46.18 (strong dominant), bwm top-1 = 42.27 (weaker dominant). lasttoken's distractor cosine baseline is lower (0.60 vs 0.68), giving more lift headroom under PAPO.

trivial_vs_meaningful_PASS_classificatio.trivial_PASS_at_k_6: k=6 = rank(D) = number of pairs. Sequential alpha=1 project-out on full rank forces all 6 paired diffs to 0 by linear algebra: H_en[k] - H_ko[k] = 0 for all k → cos=1.0 by identity. SMA=1.0 is mathematically guaranteed, NOT a measurement of learned self-binding. raw#10 honest: this is metric exploit, not lever discovery.
trivial_vs_meaningful_PASS_classificatio.meaningful_PASS_at_k_lt_6: k<6 PCA components retain partial paired diff variance. SMA<1.0 reflects partial alignment. The PASS at k=3 (lasttoken) means top-3 dominant EN-KO axes capture enough of the bilingual binding structure that their removal yields V2 PASS — a real lever signature, not a degeneracy.
trivial_vs_meaningful_PASS_classificatio.implication_for_fine_tune: fine-tune that learns top-3 PCA-aligned self-binding direction can plausibly achieve V2 PASS. Top-6 fine-tune would over-constrain (representations collapse). raw#10: substrate-level lever ceiling identified, real fine-tune translation requires TRAINED forward (deferred to next cycle, GPU-bound).

saturation_finding: V2 metric (paired |cos| − distractor |cos|) has rank-vulnerability: k=6 PAPO gives trivial PASS via rank exhaustion. Meaningful PASS occurs at k=3 (lasttoken) or k=5 (bwm). The metric is partially saturable by axis count — fine-tune that targets these axes can achieve PASS, but rank-saturation is a metric-level vulnerability worth flagging in raw#12 ledger.

implication_for_4tuple_PASS.V2: PASS_AT_k3_PAPO (meaningful, lasttoken) or PASS_AT_k5_PAPO (bwm). substrate-level achievable.
implication_for_4tuple_PASS.composite: 4-tuple PASS path: V0 ✓, V2 ✓ (BASE), V1/V3 still blocked. 2/4 axes PASS confirmed substrate-level.

next_lever_candidates_remaining: V1: prompt 16->32 expansion (forward needed, raw#9 violation, deferred)
V3: spec fix decision (Option C: new V3_v3 verifier 5-tuple expansion, $0 spec work)
V2 PASS in TRAINED: TRAINED p1 lasttoken h_last forward + multi-axis PAPO measurement (forward needed)
Mk.X T10-13 G1-G4 gate fire criteria (architecture path, $0 spec)

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — k=6 trivial PASS 명시 별도 분류, k<6 meaningful PASS 별도 분류, fine-tune translation은 별도 검증 필요 명시
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — V2 PASS predicate frozen (V2 spec, raw#12), k/alpha grid 사전 등록, post-hoc 변경 없음. metric rank-vulnerability는 finding으로 ledger 등록
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for V2 multi-axis PAPO finding
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (§9.2.1 follow-up) → impl (new tool + measurement + this finding SSOT) → fixpoint marker
